name: TANCY
description:
DJ Tancy started out in Georgia, bringing a sharp ear for selection and mood into his sets. His sound leans into groovy 140+ BPM territory — hypnotic, driving rhythms that unfold slowly on the dancefloor.

His approach is all about texture and space in the mix, moving between raw club energy and more atmospheric, melodic shades of electronic music, drawing inspiration from artists like Bonobo.

Minimal, deep, and groove-focused — Tancy’s sets are built on patience, flow, and a precise sense of timing.
